why_wrong: Case Clocked Range Bucket: forces the main output to zero, so coarse compilation passes but behavioral stimulus points fail.
Case Clocked Range Bucket: keeps the main datapath plausible while reporting the wrong metric value.
Case Clocked Range Bucket: mishandles reset or initialization, passing steady-state samples but failing startup or recovery checks.
Case Clocked Range Bucket: uses a shifted or inverted decision condition that can pass one mode but fails boundary cases.
Case Clocked Range Bucket: uses a wrong gain or scale factor, leaving shape plausible while calibrated checks fail.
